title: neotorularia karatavica
intro: Neotorularia karatavica, also known as the Siberian tansy, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It possesses medicinal properties, primarily due to its sesquiterpene lactone content, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is known for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues. Neotorularia karatavica is commonly prepared as an herbal infusion, tincture, or tea for medicinal purposes.
